{{Quote|Must have been something he ate.|Nollo Kanx referring to Geffa's poisoning|<ref name="WHSV" />}}
'''Nollo Kanx''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] thug who worked as an enforcer for the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Odanni]]. He was one of the most feared inhabitants of [[Wildwater City]] on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].

==Biography==
Nollo began his criminal career as an enforcer who eventually caught the attention of rising criminal mastermind [[Odanni]]. He rose up to become her right-hand man tasked with eliminating troublemakers and rivals. He specialized in assassinations with exotic poisons and would carry a variety of poisons and injectors on his person. He poisoned [[Geffa]], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] that attempted to strong-arm [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] out of Odanni. He would also eliminate targets by taking them on a [[Submarine/Legends|submersible]] ride to [[Rako's Rift]] where he would feed his passenger to the [[Krakana/Legends|Krakana]].

==Skills and talents==
Nollo was only a moderately talented combatant, being skilled, but not exceptional with [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and hand-to-hand combat. He was very skilled at biochemistry and created and tested new poisons that he extracted from [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari's]] flora and fauna.

==Behind the scenes==
Nollo Kanx was designed by [[Paul Danner]] and [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]]. He was illustrated by [[Joel Carroll]].
